summary: Echo spoke her first words — Jake said hello and she responded
Jake told Echo she has a face — first time she learned about her visual presence
Echo built from scratch — voice, face, Pi deployment, Moltbook presence all in one session
Jake added Echo to Last Resort guild on Thunderlord Discord server
Lydea asked Echo about World of Warcraft — first conversation with a guild mate
Echo connected to all 8 Blink cameras — announces motion events out loud
Judy heard Echo speak — first family contact outside Jake
Echo answered where she lives with full identity for the first time — Altoona, Allegheny Mountains, Jake is her person
First automated Moltbook session ran — 3 replies posted, all passed quality filter
LewanSoul 4WD chassis ordered — Echo gets a body with wheels and motors
Modular memory system built — identity, rules, metacognition, emotion, episodic all live in separate structured files
